notes.note: **Save passwords with confidence**: We've fixed password-saving issues and improved the experience when using saved passwords.
**Smoother browsing**: Fixed homepage flickering, tab counter alignment and made other stability improvements.
**Visual refinements**: Updated icons and other visual refinements throughout Firefox.

system_requirements:
## Operating systems
 - iOS 15
 - iOS 16
 - iOS 17
 - iOS 18
 - iOS 26
text:
Enjoying Firefox? Leave a review. Got ideas or feedback? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2]

[1]: https://connect.mozilla.org/
[2]: https://mzl.la/iOSSupport
title: Firefox for iOS 153.0 Release
